title: INSERT INTO a MERGE TABLE crashes mserver5
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE m (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE t1 (i INTEGER, j FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE t2 (i INTEGER, k DATE);
CREATE TABLE m_t1 AS SELECT * FROM t1;
CREATE TABLE m_t2 AS SELECT * FROM t2;
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO a MERGE TABLE causes crash
